name: strucmod-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace for strucmod — an agent-assisted structural modeling and academic-paper composition pipeline for economics graduate research (DSGE, CGE, heterogeneous-agent, dynamic programming).

plugins.name: strucmod
plugins.description: Plan → calibrate → solve → simulate → write a real academic paper. 30+ skills (setup-dsge, setup-cge-gtap, setup-ha-bewley, calibrate-from-moments, solve-perturbation, solve-vfi, simulate-irf, counterfactual-run, plus 7 paper-composition skills) and 7 review subagents that together turn one natural-language research question into a publication-grade LaTeX manuscript with figures and a bibliography. Output of UIBE Graduate Education Reform Project.
